title: Death Redone
description: Instead of losing your inventory, players receive a stacking 1 heart penalty which can be reduced with sleep. Includes a simple class system for added roleplay potential.
body:
Instead of losing their inventory, players are given a 1 heart penalty each time they die. Sleeping will restore one of their hearts. In addition to this, there is a basic class system which players can use to enhance their minecraft experience.

Builder:
-  +1 Block Reach
-  Haste I
-  Explosion Immunity
-  -2 Damage

Squire:
-  +20% Movement & Swim Speed
-  Water Breathing I
-  No Fall Damage
-  -2 Hearts

Warrior:
-  +2 Hearts
-  +2 Attack
-  Fire Resistance
-  -20% Movement & Swim Speed

Beggar:
-  Rewarad on Sleep
-  Saturation I
-  No Health Penalty
-  -5 Hearts
~~~~
Upon reaching level 100, players can use the Class Selector to upgrade their class, giving increased stats. Classes are not lost upon death.
~~~~
This mod is not meant to be used out of the box, although it is functional, and there is a crafting recepie for the class selector, it is recommended that some kind of starter kit mod is used in addition to give the player one on spawn.
